tasks.task_goal: Split a concrete paver into two pieces to fit a curved garden path
tasks.expected_outcome: The paver fractures along the scored line into two usable sections with a relatively clean break
required_tool_attributes: hardened steel chisel edge to concentrate stress
heavy hammer head for high-momentum impacts
rigid handle for efficient force transmission
broad striking face to deliver controlled blows
unconventional_tools: Large flathead screwdriver (as a scoring chisel) paired with a 10-20 lb cast-iron dumbbell used as the striker
Flat pry bar with a chisel/wedge end (as the chisel) struck with a 12-inch adjustable wrench used as a makeshift hammer
Hardened concrete nail (as a scoring punch) struck with a kettlebell held by the handle for high-momentum blows

tasks.task_goal: Crack open a walnut to extract intact nutmeat
tasks.expected_outcome: The shell breaks while the kernel remains mostly whole and retrievable
required_tool_attributes: hard opposing jaws to compress the shell
levered pivot for mechanical advantage
rigid frame that resists flexing
textured grips to prevent slipping

tasks.task_goal: Shatter a car side window to escape during an emergency
tasks.expected_outcome: The tempered glass fractures into small cubes, creating an exit opening
required_tool_attributes: hardened pointed tip to focus impact
sufficient head mass for impulse delivery
ergonomic, non-slip grip
spring-loaded striker or rigid hammer head for sudden force

tasks.task_goal: Break up thick ice sheets on a driveway to clear a walking path
tasks.expected_outcome: The ice fractures into smaller chunks that can be shoveled away
required_tool_attributes: sharp, hardened steel blade to penetrate ice
long rigid handle for swing arc and energy
secure head-to-handle connection for repeated impacts
adequate head mass for effective blows

tasks.task_goal: Snap a ceramic tile along a straight score to fit around a corner
tasks.expected_outcome: The tile cleanly breaks along the score line, producing a straight edge
required_tool_attributes: carbide scoring wheel to create a stress riser
rigid rails/base to prevent flexing
snap bar to apply concentrated bending force
lever handle for controlled load
unconventional_tools: Glass cutter with metal straightedge and a sturdy table edge to snap
Carbide-tipped masonry drill bit used as a scribe with an aluminum level as guide, then snapped over a wooden dowel using a broom handle as lever
Hand grout saw (carbide grit) to score, then an F-clamp pressing over a pencil as snap bar on a flat board base

tasks.task_goal: Break apart a frozen block of ground meat for cooking
tasks.expected_outcome: The frozen mass fractures into smaller chunks that thaw and cook evenly
required_tool_attributes: flat or textured striking face to distribute or focus impact
food-safe, corrosion-resistant head
sufficient head mass for effective impacts
rigid handle for energy transfer

tasks.task_goal: Break a rusted padlock shackle on your own shed after losing the key
tasks.expected_outcome: The shackle fractures/cuts through, allowing the lock to be removed
required_tool_attributes: hardened steel jaws exceeding shackle hardness
long handles for leverage
robust pivot for high clamping force
rigid arms to prevent flex under load

tasks.task_goal: Knock out a section of drywall to access a hidden junction box
tasks.expected_outcome: The drywall fractures and a controlled opening is created around the box
required_tool_attributes: hardened striking face for impact
balanced head with adequate mass
rigid handle for control
beveled edges to focus impact on brittle gypsum

tasks.task_goal: Break large compacted soil clods when preparing a garden bed
tasks.expected_outcome: Soil clods fracture into finer particles suitable for planting
required_tool_attributes: hardened pick end to concentrate force
heavy head for momentum
long rigid handle for swing energy
durable head-to-handle attachment

tasks.task_goal: Split a landscaping rock into smaller manageable pieces
tasks.expected_outcome: The rock fractures along chisel marks into smaller pieces
required_tool_attributes: hardened chisel edge to create stress lines
heavy hammer head to deliver impactful blows
rigid handle for accurate strikes
broad striking face for stability
unconventional_tools: large flathead screwdriver (used as a chisel)
adjustable wrench used as a hammer
a heavy rock used as a striking tool

tasks.task_goal: Shatter a sheet of brittle toffee for dessert garnish
tasks.expected_outcome: The toffee breaks into decorative shards of various sizes
required_tool_attributes: flat, smooth striking face to control fragment size
sufficient head mass to exceed brittle strength
rigid handle for precise impacts
food-safe construction
unconventional_tools: heavy-bottomed small saucepan used bottom-first as a striker
ceramic mug held by the handle, using its flat base
glass measuring cup with handle, using the flat bottom

tasks.task_goal: Snap off delicate 3D-printed support structures from a PLA model
tasks.expected_outcome: Supports cleanly break away from the model without damaging details
required_tool_attributes: narrow, hard jaws to concentrate bending stress
fine tip for precise grip
levered handles for mechanical advantage
textured grips for control

tasks.task_goal: Fracture a CD/DVD before disposal to prevent data recovery
tasks.expected_outcome: The disc cracks and splits into multiple pieces, rendering data unreadable
required_tool_attributes: rigid, hardened jaws for strong clamping
screw mechanism to apply high compressive force
stable base to resist movement
parallel jaws to apply even stress

tasks.task_goal: Break an old cast iron soil pipe during bathroom demolition
tasks.expected_outcome: The pipe snaps cleanly at the targeted location
required_tool_attributes: hardened cutting wheels/links to score the pipe
chain wrap to distribute load circumferentially
ratcheting lever to apply high tension
rigid frame to resist deformation
unconventional_tools: Bicycle chain loop cinched tight with a ratcheting cargo strap (using the strap’s ratchet as the tensioning lever)
Heavy tow chain wrapped and tightened via a Spanish windlass using a steel pry bar or wrench as the twisting lever
Linked wide stainless worm-drive hose clamps with a thin steel shim (e.g., a hacksaw blade segment) under the band to act as a scoring edge, tightened with a nut driver

tasks.task_goal: Crush a garlic bulb to separate cloves quickly
tasks.expected_outcome: The bulb’s base plate fractures and cloves separate for peeling
required_tool_attributes: wide, rigid blade to spread impact
sufficient mass for a decisive strike
flat surface to apply compressive load
sturdy handle for safe control
unconventional_tools: small cast-iron skillet (use the flat bottom)
sturdy ceramic mug (flat base and handle)

tasks.task_goal: Break a pallet board free to salvage scrap wood
tasks.expected_outcome: Selected boards pry and snap away from the pallet frame
required_tool_attributes: hardened curved claw to get under boards
flat wedge tip to focus prying force
long lever arm for mechanical advantage
rigid steel construction to prevent flex
unconventional_tools: steel bow rake (garden rake) used to hook tines under the board and lever with the long handle
garden hoe with a forged steel blade slid under the board edge to pry using the handle as a lever
car scissor jack positioned under a slat to lift it off the stringer using screw-driven mechanical advantage

tasks.task_goal: Shatter a cracked ceramic flower pot to free a root-bound plant
tasks.expected_outcome: The pot breaks into pieces without harming the root ball
required_tool_attributes: hardened rounded peen to localize impact
adequate head mass for clean fracture
rigid handle for control
secure head-to-handle fit
unconventional_tools: Stone or metal pestle (from a mortar and pestle)
Pipe wrench (using the rounded back of the head)

tasks.task_goal: Chip through a plaster wall to create a small cable pass-through
tasks.expected_outcome: The plaster fractures, leaving a neat opening sized for the cable
required_tool_attributes: chisel peen to concentrate force
hardened striking face for durability
balanced head with sufficient mass
rigid handle for precise blows
unconventional_tools: claw hammer (using the claw as a chisel edge)

tasks.task_goal: Open a fishing hole by breaking lake ice near the shore
tasks.expected_outcome: The ice fractures and a hole is created through successive strikes
required_tool_attributes: heavy, hardened chisel tip to penetrate ice
long shaft for swing and reach
non-slip grip for control
rigid, one-piece construction

tasks.task_goal: Break an epoxy-bonded joint between two metal plates during disassembly
tasks.expected_outcome: The adhesive bond and, if necessary, a thin edge of material fracture, separating the plates
required_tool_attributes: hardened, acute chisel edge to focus stress
heavy hammer for impactful force
rigid handles for accurate energy transfer
tough tool steel to resist chipping
unconventional_tools: large flathead screwdriver used as a makeshift cold chisel
flat pry bar (wonder bar) driven along the seam
adjustable wrench used as a striking hammer
